name: Goldston, Carolyn
evidence: Austin 78759 donor, heavily Democratic FEC pattern (56 gifts, lean 1.0), gave to Jeff Travillion. Could not confirm occupation; the only Carolyn Goldston obituary found (b.1937, d.2015) predates this donor's 2017-2023 giving, so it is a different person. No occupation/employer corroborated.

name: Williams, Talley
resolved_employer: Metcalfe Wolff Stuart & Williams, LLP (partner; real estate / land use development attorney)
evidence: Talley J. Williams is a partner at Metcalfe Wolff Stuart & Williams LLP at 221 W. 6th St, Austin 78701 - exact name + zip match. Practice focuses on development/funding agreements, special taxing districts (PIDs) and economic incentives. Gave to Ann Howard.

name: High, Joy
evidence: Austin donor (zip 78765 is an Austin PO-box zip), gave to Brigid Shea. A 'Joy High' operates as a professional home organizer in downtown Austin, a plausible but uncorroborated match; no zip/occupation confirmation, so identity unresolved.

name: Harwell, Carol
evidence: Georgetown 78626 donor, very heavy Democratic giving (137 FEC gifts, lean 0.96), gave to Brigid Shea - consistent with a politically active person. A prominent Carol Anne Harwell was Barack Obama's first (1996) campaign manager, but public sources place her in Chicago/Illinois, not Georgetown TX; could not corroborate that this Central Texas donor is that person or any specific Austin political consultant. Occupation unconfirmed.

name: Brown, Armann
evidence: Armann Brown is an Austin-based area/amateur scout for the Athletics (MLB); signed Max Muncy and scouted Kyler Murray. Name, Austin residence and self-reported occupation ('MLB Scout', employer 'Athletics') all match. Gave to George Morales.

name: Lash, John
evidence: Austin 78756 donor, single small 2026 gift to Brigid Shea. Multiple 'John Lash' candidates exist (an Austin Engineering Co. water-truck driver; a restorative-justice practitioner) but none could be tied to this zip/donation; common name, identity unresolved.

name: Lawrence, Stanton
resolved_employer: Victoria Independent School District (Assistant Superintendent of Administration); longtime Texas public-school administrator
evidence: Dr. Stanton Eugene Lawrence is Assistant Superintendent of Administration at Victoria ISD, based in Victoria, TX - matches the donor's name and Victoria 77904 location. Gave to Jeff Travillion (cross-county). Career in public K-12 education.

name: Howell, Pix
resolved_employer: Urban planning & design consultant (Doucet/Kleinfelder program manager; formerly City of Austin Urban Design and City of Leander Urban Design Officer)
evidence: Pix Howell is a distinctively named Austin-area program manager and community/urban planner with 40+ years in resource planning, policy and land development; self-reported occupation 'Consultant / Self' matches. Gave to Jeff Travillion and Margaret Gomez.

name: Amy Pattillo Campaign
resolved_employer: Candidate campaign committee of Amy Pattillo (Rollingwood, TX City Council member 2017-2019; attorney - General Counsel & COO; CAMPO / Travis County bond committee appointee)
evidence: The donor is a political campaign committee (not an individual). Amy Pattillo is a former Rollingwood City Council member and an attorney/business executive (General Counsel & COO) active in Travis County civic bodies. The committee gave to Travillion, Howard and Gomez in Nov 2021. As a committee it has no single 'industry'.

name: O'Donnell, Denis
evidence: Austin 78744 donor, single 2017 gift to George Morales. A well-known Austin Denis O'Donnell owns The White Horse honky-tonk / Sagebrush (hospitality-entertainment), a plausible match, but his venues are in East Austin and no zip/occupation link to 78744 could be confirmed; identity unresolved.

name: Cantu, Sylvia
evidence: Austin 78752 donor, single 2025 gift to George Morales. 'Sylvia/Silvia Cantu' is very common in Central Texas (350+ in TX); no occupation or specific record could be tied to this donor. Identity unresolved.

name: Laura Caldwell Morrison
resolved_employer: Former Austin City Council Member (Place 4, 2008-2014); neighborhood advocate / former Austin Neighborhoods Council president (elected official, effectively retired from council)
evidence: Laura Caldwell Morrison is the former two-term Austin City Council Member (Place 4) and 2018 mayoral candidate, long active in Austin neighborhood and civic policy. Distinctive full name; gave to Margaret Gomez.
